### [Markets](https://www.rogerscorp.com/markets) 

    *   #### [Aerospace & Defense](https://www.rogerscorp.com/markets/aerospace-and-defense)

Advanced materials with high reliability under extreme conditions, critical for aerospace, commercial aircraft and defense applications.

    *   #### [Automotive & EV/HEV](https://www.rogerscorp.com/markets/automotive-and-ev-hev)

Rogers is a leading automotive advanced materials supplier with a wide range of industry solutions to power, protect and connect vehicles.

    *   #### [Connected Devices](https://www.rogerscorp.com/markets/connected-devices)

Enabling electronic devices and more to operate interactively or autonomously by use of wireless protocols.

    *   #### [Footwear & Impact Safety](https://www.rogerscorp.com/markets/footwear-and-impact-safety)

Advanced material technologies that provide flexible comfort and wearable impact protection.

    *   #### [General Industrial](https://www.rogerscorp.com/markets/general-industrial)

Industrial engineers and designers rely on Rogers’ advanced materials to enable reliability, efficiency and performance.

    *   #### [Major Appliances](https://www.rogerscorp.com/markets/major-appliances)

Rogers increases energy efficiency with high quality, performance-optimized power electronics.

    *   #### [Medical](https://www.rogerscorp.com/markets/medical)

Rogers enables high quality patient care in applications ranging from medical instruments to patient cushioning and wound care.

    *   #### [Portable Electronics](https://www.rogerscorp.com/markets/portable-electronics)

Rogers provides complex and compact electronics with superior fabrication and protection.

    *   #### [Printing](https://www.rogerscorp.com/markets/printing)

R/bak® cushion mounting materials provide shock absorption, compressibility, improved registration and reduced dot gain in printing applications.

    *   #### [Rail](https://www.rogerscorp.com/markets/rail)

Solutions to power and protect mass transit rail systems.

    *   #### [Wind & Solar](https://www.rogerscorp.com/markets/wind-and-solar)

Enabling system efficiency and reliability for wind and solar renewable energy sources.

    *   #### [Wired Infrastructure and Data Centers](https://www.rogerscorp.com/markets/wired-infrastructure-and-data-centers)

Materials for applications in data center & wired infrastructure environments.

    *   #### [Wireless Infrastructure](https://www.rogerscorp.com/markets/wireless-infrastructure)

Low-loss, high frequency advanced materials with well-controlled dielectric properties to enable microwave and RF applications, including mobile networks.

# RO4000® Series

 Rogers RO4000 hydrocarbon ceramic laminates and prepregs are the industry leader. Used in microwave and millimeter wave frequencies, this low loss material offers easier use in circuit fabrication and streamlined properties over traditional PTFE materials. 

![Image 6: RO4000 Series Laminates](https://www.rogerscorp.com/-/media/project/rogerscorp/images/products/acs/product-lines/ro4000-series-laminates.jpg?h=280&iar=0&w=516&hash=D8B670B45D078A9CB877780AFFCEB38E)

#### Benefits

*   Compatible with FR-4 fabrication processes
*   Well controlled dielectric constants (Dk) 
*   Above-average thermal conductivity (.6-.8)
*   Thermally robust - lead free soldering compatibility
*   Low Z-axis CTE for reliable plated through-hole quality
*   Optimized cost and RF/ microwave performance
*   Wide range of DK available (2.55-6.15)
*   UL 94 V-0 flame retardant versions available

#### [RO4000® LoPro® Laminates](https://www.rogerscorp.com/advanced-electronics-solutions/ro4000-series-laminates/ro4000-lopro-laminates)

*   Allows reverse treated foil to bond to standard RO4000® dielectric
*   Low DK loss for higher operating frequency designs 
*   Reduced passive intermodulation (PIM) performance

#### [RO4003C™ Laminates](https://www.rogerscorp.com/advanced-electronics-solutions/ro4000-series-laminates/ro4003c-laminates)

*   Original RO4000® material, used in cost sensitive Microwave/RF designs
*   Dk of 3.38 (+/-0.05)
*   Dissipating factor of 0.0027 at 10 GHz is lowest dielectric loss of R04000® product family

#### [RO4350B™ Laminates](https://www.rogerscorp.com/advanced-electronics-solutions/ro4000-series-laminates/ro4350b-laminates)

*   Market leading material for base station power amplifier designs
*   UL 94 V-0 rated 
*   Dk of 3.48 (+/-0.05)
*   Df 0.0037 at 10 GHz

#### [RO4360G2™ Laminates](https://www.rogerscorp.com/advanced-electronics-solutions/ro4000-series-laminates/ro4360g2-laminates)

*   RoHS certified
*   Low Z-axis CTE
*   Dk 6.15 (+/- 0.015) 
*   Dissipating factor of 0.0038 at 10 GHz

#### [RO4400™/RO4400T™ Series Bondply](https://www.rogerscorp.com/advanced-electronics-solutions/ro4000-series-laminates/ro4400-series-bondply)

*   Prepreg family based on RO4000 series core materials.
*   Sequential lamination capable
*   Lead free soldering capable
*   Thinner options for improved multilayer design flexibility

#### [RO4500™ Laminates](https://www.rogerscorp.com/advanced-electronics-solutions/ro4000-series-laminates/ro4500-laminates)

*   Commercial antenna grade series for high volume designs
*   Excellent mechanical rigidity for efficient and reliable installation
*   Improved PIM when used with LoPro™ copper

#### [RO4700™ Antenna Grade Laminates](https://www.rogerscorp.com/advanced-electronics-solutions/ro4000-series-laminates/ro4700-antenna-grade-laminates)

*   First RO4000® low Dk antenna grade material available
*   Dk 2.55 (+/- 0.05) or 3.0 (+/- 0.05) 
*   Df 0.0022 at 2.5 GHz or 0.0023 at 2.5 GHz, respectively

#### [RO4830™ Plus Laminates](https://www.rogerscorp.com/advanced-electronics-solutions/ro4000-series-laminates/ro4830-plus-laminates)

*   Innovative thermoset resin platform
*   VLP ED Copper Foil
*   PFAS Free

#### [RO4835™ Laminates](https://www.rogerscorp.com/advanced-electronics-solutions/ro4000-series-laminates/ro4835-laminates)

*   10x oxidation resistance compared to traditional thermoset laminates
*   Dk 3.48(+/-0.05)
*   Df 0.0037 at 10GHz

#### [RO4835IND™ LoPro® Laminates](https://www.rogerscorp.com/advanced-electronics-solutions/ro4000-series-laminates/ro4835ind-lopro-laminates)

*   RF laminates for 60 to 81 GHz industrial radar applications
*   Low insertion loss from LoPro® reverse treated copper foil
*   Reliable RF and mechanical performance

#### [RO4835T™ Laminates](https://www.rogerscorp.com/advanced-electronics-solutions/ro4000-series-laminates/ro4835t-laminates)

## Do Not Sell or Share My Personal Data

When you visit any website, it may store or retrieve information on your browser, mostly in the form of cookies. This information might be about you, your preferences or your device and is mostly used to make the website work as you expect it to. The information does not usually directly identify you, but it can give you a more personalized web experience. Because we respect your, you can choose not to allow some types of cookies. Click on the different category headings to find out more and change your default settings. However, please note that by blocking some types of cookies, it may affect your experience on the website and the services we are able to offer. For more information, please review our Privacy Policy. 

[Privacy Policy](https://www.rogerscorp.com/privacy)

### Manage Consent Preferences

#### Strictly Necessary Cookies

Always Active

These cookies are necessary for the website to function and cannot be switched off in our systems. They are usually only set in response to actions made by you which amount to a request for services, such as setting your privacy preferences, logging in or filling in forms. You can set your browser to block or alert you about these cookies, but some parts of the site will not then work. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable information.

#### Share Or Sale of Personal Data

- [x] Share Or Sale of Personal Data 

Under the CPRA, you have the right to opt-out of the sale or sharing of your personal information to third parties. These cookies collect information for analytics and to personalize your experience with targeted ads. You may exercise your right to opt out of the sale or sharing of personal information by using this toggle switch. If you opt out we will not be able to offer you personalized ads and will not hand over your personal information to any third parties. *    Thermal Management 

# Thermal Management

Where compute intensifies, Vertiv enables optimal thermal performance. Our adaptive air, liquid, and hybrid cooling systems capture, move, and manage heat with precision, powered by intelligent controls that respond instantly to changing heat loads. From chip to heat reuse, our portfolio delivers efficient, scalable cooling for legacy modernizations and next‑generation AI facilities, supporting mission‑critical performance at scale.

Learn about our market leading data center thermal management portfolio to optimize and manage the entire thermal chain from 

chip to heat reuse.
